source: Advanced Platform Features — Strategy Builder, Bots, Marketplace, AI Assistant

features.name: Strategy rule data model — condition + action JSON schema
features.description: Create backend/app/strategies/models.py with Strategy model: id, name, description, rules (JSONB), profile_name, is_preset, created_at. Rules schema: list of {condition: {indicator, operator, value}, action: 'buy'|'sell'|'hold', weight}. Use existing JSONB pattern from exit_context. No migration — store in existing metadata or create model for future migration.

features.name: Strategy rule evaluator — evaluate conditions against indicator snapshot
features.description: Create backend/app/strategies/evaluator.py: evaluate_rules(rules: list[dict], indicators: dict) -> dict with {signal: 'buy'|'sell'|'hold', score: float, triggered_rules: list}. Pure function. Supports operators: gt, lt, gte, lte, eq, cross_above, cross_below. Indicators from existing IndicatorSnapshot fields.

features.name: Strategy CRUD API — create, list, get, delete custom strategies
features.description: Add /api/v1/strategies endpoints: POST (create), GET (list), GET /{id}, DELETE /{id}. Validate rules JSON schema. Store in-memory dict for now (no DB migration). Add router to main.py.

features.name: Run custom strategy through backtest engine
features.description: Add POST /api/v1/strategies/{id}/backtest that loads strategy rules, runs them through existing backtest engine with evaluate_rules() replacing the default scoring. Returns BacktestResult.

features.name: Grid Bot preset — buy/sell at fixed price intervals
features.description: Create backend/app/strategies/presets/grid.py: generate_grid_rules(lower_price, upper_price, num_grids, amount_per_grid) -> list[dict] of strategy rules. Each grid level = buy below, sell above. Pure function returning rules JSON compatible with strategy evaluator.

features.name: DCA Bot preset — periodic buys with configurable schedule
features.description: Create backend/app/strategies/presets/dca_bot.py: generate_dca_rules(interval_hours, amount_per_buy, max_buys, price_drop_bonus_pct) -> list[dict]. DCA buys at fixed intervals, bonus buy on dip. Returns rules JSON.

features.name: BTD (Buy The Dip) / QFL Bot preset
features.description: Create backend/app/strategies/presets/btd.py: generate_btd_rules(dip_pct, recovery_pct, take_profit_pct) -> list[dict]. Buys when price drops X% from recent high, sells on Y% recovery or take profit. Returns rules JSON.

features.name: Preset bots API — list and instantiate presets
features.description: Add GET /api/v1/strategies/presets listing available bot types (grid, dca, btd) with param schemas. POST /api/v1/strategies/from-preset to create strategy from preset with user params.

features.name: Strategy sharing — publish/unpublish strategies
features.description: Add is_public field to Strategy model. POST /api/v1/strategies/{id}/publish and /unpublish. GET /api/v1/marketplace lists all public strategies with backtest metrics (if run).

features.name: Copy-trading — clone a public strategy
features.description: POST /api/v1/marketplace/{strategy_id}/copy creates a private copy of a public strategy for the user. Tracks copy_count on original. Returns new strategy.

features.name: Strategy ranking by backtest performance
features.description: GET /api/v1/marketplace/ranking returns public strategies sorted by backtest Sharpe ratio. Include: name, return, MDD, Sharpe, win_rate, copy_count. Filterable by style tag (grid, dca, btd, custom).

features.name: Strategy parameter optimizer — grid search best params
features.description: Create backend/app/strategies/optimizer.py: optimize_params(strategy_rules, price_data, param_ranges) -> list[dict] sorted by Sharpe. Tests param combinations by running backtest engine on each. Returns top 5 configs with metrics. Pure Python, no LLM.

features.name: Optimizer API endpoint
features.description: POST /api/v1/strategies/{id}/optimize accepts param_ranges dict, runs optimizer, returns top 5 configurations with backtest results. Rate-limit to 1 concurrent optimization.

features.name: Webhook signal receiver — accept external buy/sell signals
features.description: Add POST /api/v1/signals/webhook accepting JSON: {symbol, action: buy|sell, source, confidence, metadata}. Validate, store in-memory signal buffer, expose via GET /api/v1/signals/recent. Supports TradingView alert format.

features.name: Map external signals to strategy actions
features.description: Create backend/app/signals/mapper.py: map_signal_to_action(signal, strategy_rules) -> dict with action recommendation. Allow strategy rules to reference 'external_signal' as a condition source alongside indicators.

features.name: AI portfolio analysis report generator
features.description: Create backend/app/ai_assistant/portfolio_report.py: generate_portfolio_report(positions, risk_metrics, recent_trades, regime) -> str. Uses local templates (like existing report provider) to create readable analysis: what's working, what's not, regime context, suggestions. No external API.

features.name: AI strategy improvement suggestions
features.description: Create backend/app/ai_assistant/strategy_advisor.py: suggest_improvements(strategy_rules, backtest_result) -> list[str]. Analyzes backtest metrics and suggests parameter tweaks: 'RSI threshold too tight', 'Add trailing stop', 'Reduce position size'. Template-based, no LLM.

features.name: AI Assistant API endpoints
features.description: Add GET /api/v1/ai/portfolio-report and GET /api/v1/ai/strategy-suggestions/{strategy_id}. Wire to assistant modules. Add router to main.py.

features.name: Strategy Builder View — rule list with add/remove
features.description: New StrategyBuilderView.vue: form to add rules (select indicator, operator, value, action). Show rules as cards. Save button calls POST /api/v1/strategies. No drag-and-drop yet — simple form-based builder. Add to router + nav.

features.name: Preset Bots selector in Strategy Builder
features.description: Add preset bot section to StrategyBuilderView: cards for Grid, DCA, BTD bots. Click opens param form (grid: price range + levels, DCA: interval + amount, BTD: dip%). Submit creates strategy from preset.

features.name: Marketplace View — browse and copy public strategies
features.description: New MarketplaceView.vue: list of public strategies with metrics (Sharpe, return, MDD), style tags, copy button. Sort by ranking. Filter by style. Add to router + nav.

features.name: AI Assistant panel in Dashboard
features.description: Add collapsible AI Assistant panel to DashboardView: shows portfolio analysis report, strategy suggestions, and improvement tips. Pull from /ai/portfolio-report. Refresh button.

features.name: Academy content API — articles and guides
features.description: Create backend/app/academy/content.py with static articles: 'What is RSI', 'How trailing stops work', 'DCA strategy explained', 'Grid bot basics', 'Risk management 101'. Store as list of dicts. GET /api/v1/academy/articles returns list, GET /api/v1/academy/articles/{slug} returns content.

features.name: Academy View — educational content browser
features.description: New AcademyView.vue: grid of article cards with titles and short descriptions. Click opens article in markdown. Category filter (indicators, strategies, risk). Add to router + nav.
